title: Fix race condition in async task queue
original_text: Fixed a race condition in the async task queue where multiple tasks could modify shared state simultaneously. Added a mutex lock around the critical section in task_queue.py. Also implemented proper task cancellation to prevent orphaned tasks. Updated the task scheduler to use atomic operations for state changes. Added tests in tests/test_async_queue.py to verify thread safety. Result: 23 tests pass, no race conditions detected.
expected_subject: fix(async): add mutex lock to prevent race conditions
expected_body_lines: - Add mutex lock around critical section in task_queue.py
- Use atomic operations for state changes
- Validation: 23 tests pass, no race conditions detected
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(async): add mutex lock to prevent race conditions"
